comment: Expansion #4 Step-2 fan-out, shape B (dict->list[str]). Transcribed verbatim from scraper_luckygunner.py inline CALIBER_PATHS on 2026-06-14, parity-proven byte-identical before flip. Each inline value carried its '?show=100' paging suffix inline; stored here split into path + query so the redirect guard can ignore the query. 223-556 splits upstream into two collection pages (.223 Rem + 5.56x45), both bucket to 223-556 via normalize_caliber and seen_ids dedups cross-listed SKUs. Platform family not positively classified, labelled 'custom' (honest-by-default, not load-bearing). Not yet harness-validated; validation null until Step-3. Approved by Jon, Step-2 fan-out, 2026-06-14.
